subcodes.first_line: O God, Knower of mysteries, Sweet of utterance! Thou art aware and bearest witness that every eve and every morn, with utmost [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خدای رازدان خوش سخن تو آگاهی و گواهی که در هر شامی و هر صبحگاهی با کمال
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love of God, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
